Meaning.En: The invisible gaseous substance surrounding the Earth, composed mainly of nitrogen and oxygen.
Meaning.Example: The air was fresh and cool after the rain.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả trạng thái hoặc chất lượng của không khí trong môi trường.
Situation.En: Describing the state or quality of the atmospheric gas in the environment.

Meaning.En: The stream of air blown into or out of a wind instrument to produce sound.
Meaning.Example: The flutist took a deep breath to control her air flow.

Situation.Vi: Ngữ cảnh khi chơi nhạc cụ hơi như sáo, kèn.
Situation.En: Context when playing wind instruments such as flute or trumpet.

Meaning.Vi: sự phô trương, khoe khoang (thường dùng trong cụm "put on airs")
Meaning.En: An air of superiority or pretentiousness; a manner intended to impress others.
Meaning.Example: She spoke with an air of confidence that impressed the interviewers.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả thái độ giả tạo, kiêu ngạo trong giao tiếp.
Situation.En: Describing a pretentious or overly confident manner in social interaction.
